'''鈭歜-ng-d''' ('''kabangad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:perbreak|perbreak]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ng-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:perbreak|perbreak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-ng-d
|-
! Lemma
| kabangad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibangad|thibangad]] || [[word:jibangad|jibangad]] || [[word:shibangad|shibangad]] || [[word:kibangad|kibangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubangad|thuthubangad]] || [[word:jujubangad|jujubangad]] || [[word:shushubangad|shushubangad]] || [[word:kukubangad|kukubangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubangad|thubangad]] || [[word:jubangad|jubangad]] || [[word:shubangad|shubangad]] || [[word:kubangad|kubangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubangad|thubangad]] || [[word:jubangad|jubangad]] || [[word:shubangad|shubangad]] || [[word:kubangad|kubangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebangad|thebangad]] || [[word:jebangad|jebangad]] || [[word:shebangad|shebangad]] || [[word:kebangad|kebangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobangad|thothobangad]] || [[word:jojobangad|jojobangad]] || [[word:shoshobangad|shoshobangad]] || [[word:kokobangad|kokobangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobangad|thobangad]] || [[word:jobangad|jobangad]] || [[word:shobangad|shobangad]] || [[word:kobangad|kobangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobangad|thobangad]] || [[word:jobangad|jobangad]] || [[word:shobangad|shobangad]] || [[word:kobangad|kobangad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]] || [[word:bangad|bangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bangad|th忙bangad]] || [[word:j忙bangad|j忙bangad]] || [[word:sh忙bangad|sh忙bangad]] || [[word:k忙bangad|k忙bangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabangad|thathabangad]] || [[word:jajabangad|jajabangad]] || [[word:shashabangad|shashabangad]] || [[word:kakabangad|kakabangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabangad|thabangad]] || [[word:jabangad|jabangad]] || [[word:shabangad|shabangad]] || [[word:kabangad|kabangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabangad|thabangad]] || [[word:jabangad|jabangad]] || [[word:shabangad|shabangad]] || [[word:kabangad|kabangad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabangad|shabangad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabangad|goshabangad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabangad|gokishabangad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabangadn眉|shabangadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabangadnkn眉|goshabangadnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangadn眉|gokishabangadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabangadsh毛|shabangadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabangadnksh毛|goshabangadnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabangadsh毛|gokishabangadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangadro|shabangadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangadnkro|goshabangadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangadro|gokishabangadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangadmu|shabangadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangadnkmu|goshabangadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangadmu|gokishabangadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabangadsher|shabangadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabangadnksher|goshabangadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabangadsher|gokishabangadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabangadng|shabangadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabangadnkng|goshabangadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabangadng|gokishabangadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabangadya|shabangadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabangadnkya|goshabangadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabangadya|gokishabangadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabangadyam|shabangadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabangadnkyam|goshabangadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabangadyam|gokishabangadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabangadn眉sh毛|shabangadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabangadnkn眉sh毛|goshabangadnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabangadn眉sh毛|gokishabangadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangadn眉ro|shabangadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangadnkn眉ro|goshabangadnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangadn眉ro|gokishabangadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangadn眉mu|shabangadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangadnkn眉mu|goshabangadnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangadn眉mu|gokishabangadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabangadsh毛n眉|shabangadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabangadnksh毛n眉|goshabangadnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangadsh毛n眉|gokishabangadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangadsh毛ro|shabangadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangadnksh毛ro|goshabangadnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangadsh毛ro|gokishabangadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangadsh毛mu|shabangadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangadnksh毛mu|goshabangadnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangadsh毛mu|gokishabangadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabangadron眉|shabangadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabangadnkron眉|goshabangadnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangadron眉|gokishabangadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabangadrosh毛|shabangadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabangadnkrosh毛|goshabangadnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabangadrosh毛|gokishabangadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangadromu|shabangadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangadnkromu|goshabangadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangadromu|gokishabangadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabangadmun眉|shabangadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabangadnkmun眉|goshabangadnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangadmun眉|gokishabangadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabangadmush毛|shabangadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabangadnkmush毛|goshabangadnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabangadmush毛|gokishabangadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangadmuro|shabangadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangadnkmuro|goshabangadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangadmuro|gokishabangadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
